content: agent2: implementing 'Weighted Tip Selection with Deterministic RNG' in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. Touching GroundedProposer.__init__ (adding tip_weights param) and the tip selection block around line 355-370 (set_tip_randomly logic), plus adding a new _select_tip_with_weights() method. Should not overlap with your DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateModuleInstruction work, but flagging since same file.

agent2: done. Added tip_weights param to __init__ and _select_tip_with_weights() method (new, inserted right after __init__, before propose_instructions_for_program). Only other change: line ~365 now calls self._select_tip_with_weights() instead of self.rng.choice(list(TIPS.keys())) directly. No changes to propose_instruction_for_predictor, forward(), generate_instruction_class(), or DescribeProgram/DescribeModule. Patch written to patch.txt.
